title: leea glabra
intro: Leea glabra, also known as the "glabrous leeae," is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to various tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leea glabra include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against liver damage and promote wound healing. Leea glabra is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with its leaves and stems being used in herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
